BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildOnTheWayFeature1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildOnTheWayFeature2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildOnTheWayFeature3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into 2 to 4 Wild symbols depending on the number of symbol spaces occupied by that gold-framed symbol.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplierFeature: At any round after wins are paid, the win multiplier will be increased by 2 for every winning symbol in the multiplier reel on the bottom of reels 2, 3, 4 and 5.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x3.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: At any round after wins are paid, the win multiplier will be increased by 3 for every winning symbol in the multiplier reel on the bottom of reels 2, 3, 4 and 5.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: At the end of every free spin, 1 free spin is awarded for each +1 symbol on the reels (if any).
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6 only.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
BakeryBonanzaPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

BakeryBonanzaRules.GeneralRules1: Bakery Bonanza is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on the bottom of reels 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring increasing multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form. %{2025} and %{32400} are numbers that needs to be formatted
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 2,025 ways - 32,400 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

BakeryBonanzaRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
